Author: GitHub
Title: How to use GitHub issues and projects | GitHub for Beginners
Description:
Welcome back to the GitHub for Beginners series! In this season, we are taking you back to the basics. Learn how to stay organized by creating GitHub issues, syncing them to project boards, and tracking your work efficiently from start to finish. Let's Git into it!

Developer portfolio template: https://github.com/github-samples/gitfolio?utm\_source=youtube-episode-1&utm\_medium=video&utm\_campaign=gfb-s3-2026
